summary: Comprehensive testing of Herion v3.0 - Controlled Execution Platform with 9 specialist agents + 1 Admin coordinator. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed one bug in approval endpoint (NoneType error when orchestration_result is null). Frontend UI verified: login, dashboard with new status badges, 9-agent pipeline on Agents page, practice detail with approval gate UI, timeline, role-based system prompt visibility.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: Root endpoint shows Herion branding
Backend: Admin login with admin@aic.it / Admin123! works correctly
Backend: Invalid credentials return 401
Backend: GET /api/agents/info returns 9 specialist agents (intake, ledger, compliance, documents, delegate, deadline, flow, monitor, advisor)
Backend: GET /api/agents/info includes admin_agent info
Backend: GET /api/agents/info has correct pipeline order
Backend: GET /api/agents/info total_agents is 10 (9 specialists + 1 admin)
Backend: Admin user sees system_prompt in agents/info
Backend: Non-admin user does NOT see system_prompt (role-based visibility working)
Backend: POST /api/practices creates practice with 'draft' status
Backend: Practice has new controlled execution fields (orchestration_result, risk_level, delegation_status, approval_snapshot_id, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/practices/{id}/timeline returns chronological events
Backend: Timeline has practice_created event on creation
Backend: POST /api/practices/{id}/approve endpoint exists and validates status
Backend: Approval requires 'waiting_approval' status
Backend: Can manually update status to waiting_approval
Backend: Full approval flow works: waiting_approval -> approved -> submitted -> completed
Backend: All new status values accepted (draft, in_progress, waiting_approval, blocked, escalated)
Backend: Old 'pending' status still works for backward compatibility
Frontend: Login page loads with Herion branding and Italian text
Frontend: Login with admin credentials redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats cards with new status counts
Frontend: Dashboard shows practices with various statuses (In Attesa, Escalation, Completata, In Attesa di Approvazione, Bozza)
Frontend: Agents page shows 'Piattaforma di Esecuzione Controllata' title
Frontend: Agents page shows 9 agent cards with correct pipeline order
Frontend: Agents page shows approval gate indicator at end of pipeline
Frontend: Agents page shows Herion Admin card
Frontend: Admin user sees 'Istruzioni di Sistema (Admin)' section with system prompt
Frontend: Practice detail page shows 9-agent execution section
Frontend: Practice detail page shows timeline (Cronologia)
Frontend: Practice detail page shows 'Chiedi a Herion' chat section
Frontend: All UI text in Italian
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed NoneType error in approve_practice endpoint line 1351)

test_credentials.test_user: Any new email like test@herion.it / TestPass123!

seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-created on startup with credentials from .env
context_for_next_testing_agent: Herion v3.0 Controlled Execution Platform is fully functional. Backend has 9 specialist agents (intake, ledger, compliance, documents, delegate, deadline, flow, monitor, advisor) + Herion Admin coordinator. New status model: draft, in_progress, waiting_approval, approved, submitted, completed, blocked, escalated. Approval flow creates approval_snapshot and transitions through approved->submitted->completed. Timeline endpoint returns chronological events. Role-based visibility: system prompts only visible to admin users. All LLM calls use Emergent LLM Key for GPT-5.2 (orchestration runs 10 LLM calls sequentially, may take 30-60 seconds).

mocked_apis.email_sending: Password reset email is MOCKED - reset link logged to backend console
mocked_apis.llm_calls: NOT MOCKED - All LLM calls use real Emergent LLM Key for GPT-5.2

bug_fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' in approve_practice endpoint
bug_fixed.root_cause: practice.get('orchestration_result', {}) returns None when field is explicitly set to null in MongoDB, not an empty dict
bug_fixed.verification: All 20 backend tests pass including approval flow test

agents.role_based_visibility: system_prompt visible only to admin users

timeline.events: Chronological list of all practice events

ui.practice_detail: Approval gate UI when status is waiting_approval with orchestration_result
